name: Un utilisateur non authentifié est redirigé vers la page de connexion lorsqu'il tente d'accéder aux routes protégées

steps.name: Ouvrir l'application sur la page de connexion
Wait for selector getByRole('button', { name: 'Accepter les cookies' })
Wait for selector getByRole('button', { name: 'Rester sur le navigateur' })
Click getByRole('button', { name: 'Rester sur le navigateur' })

retries.statusDetails:
Error: expect(page).toHaveURL(expected) failed

Expected pattern: /^(.*)\/sign-in(.*)$/
Received string:  "http://paymium.local:3000/email/EUR"
Timeout: 30000ms

Call log:
  - Expect "toHaveURL" with timeout 30000ms
    31 × unexpected value "http://paymium.local:3000/email/EUR"

items.statusDetails:
Error: expect(page).toHaveURL(expected) failed

Expected pattern: /\/sign-in\?redirect=%2Fprofile%2Fiban/
Received string:  "http://paymium.local:3000/sign-in?redirect=%2Fprofile%2Fidentity"
Timeout: 10000ms

Call log:
  - Expect "toHaveURL" with timeout 10000ms
    13 × unexpected value "http://paymium.local:3000/sign-in?redirect=%2Fprofile%2Fidentity"

Error: expect(page).toHaveURL(expected) failed

Expected pattern: /^(.*)\/sign-in(.*)$/
Received string:  "http://paymium.local:3000/merchants/overview"
Timeout: 30000ms

Call log:
  - Expect "toHaveURL" with timeout 30000ms
    32 × unexpected value "http://paymium.local:3000/merchants/overview"

TimeoutError: locator.waitFor: Timeout 25000ms exceeded.
Call log:
  - waiting for getByRole('button', { name: 'Accepter les cookies' }) to be visible

Error: expect(page).toHaveURL(expected) failed

Expected pattern: /^(.*)\/sign-in(.*)$/
Received string:  "http://paymium.local:3000/withdraw/BTC"
Timeout: 30000ms

Call log:
  - Expect "toHaveURL" with timeout 30000ms
    32 × unexpected value "http://paymium.local:3000/withdraw/BTC"
